title: Success Criteria, Baselines, and Prompt Evals · Contract Clinic: Eval Dataset
summary: Define and test a support-triage prompt before optimizing its wording. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt eval dataset increment in a versioned prompt evaluation harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build normal, boundary, adversarial, and changed-context evaluation cases.
Create a minimal baseline prompt before adding scaffolding or examples.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Eval Dataset evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-eval-dataset-x75cjt" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Eval Dataset into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-eval-dataset-x75cjt
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

options.text: Reconstruct the conditions for Eval Dataset, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Build normal, boundary, adversarial, and changed-context evaluation cases.
